summary: Iteration 43: Dynamic Gap-Filling for 17-Point Strategic Map Testing - All 35 tests passed. Verified GET /api/calibration/strategic-audit endpoint, WarRoomConsole audit-based completion logic (gap_count===0 for COMPLETE, auto_advance_to_step for step counter), fact_resolution.py FACT_SOURCES and ONBOARDING_FIELD_TO_FACT includes growth_goals/risk_profile, Settings page has business_stage/growth_goals/risk_profile selects with proper data-testids, OnboardingWizard Step 6 has growth_goals select, and all Save buttons execute PUT /api/business-profile via handleSaveProfile.

PASS: fact_resolution.py ONBOARDING_FIELD_TO_FACT includes growth_goals (line 78), risk_profile (line 79)
PASS: WarRoomConsole sets status=COMPLETE when gap_count === 0 (line 73)

PASS: WarRoomConsole sets progress from audit.completion_pct (line 81)

test_credentials: None required - code review and API auth verification only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Gap-Filling implementation verified complete. Key architecture: (1) GET /api/calibration/strategic-audit audits business_profiles against 17 STRATEGIC_DIMENSIONS, returns {total: 17, known_count, gap_count, completion_pct, known[], gaps[], auto_advance_to_step}, (2) WarRoomConsole calls /api/calibration/strategic-audit on load and sets status=COMPLETE when gap_count===0 (not when business_stage exists), (3) WarRoomConsole auto-advances step counter when gaps exist based on known_count, (4) fact_resolution.py FACT_SOURCES includes growth_goals, risk_profile, competitive_advantages, products_services, team_size, years_operating, (5) Settings page has business_stage, growth_goals, risk_profile selects with data-testids, (6) All 3 Settings Save buttons call handleSaveProfile which executes PUT /api/business-profile, (7) OnboardingWizard syncToBusinessProfile includes growth_goals in PROFILE_SYNC_FIELDS.
